visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a shot of the Costco Wholesale entrance. A man with short black hair, wearing a vibrant green t-shirt and blue denim jeans, is seen from behind walking into the warehouse. Bright industrial overhead lighting illuminates the spacious concrete floor and large metal signage hanging from the ceiling. (2) A rapid sequence of product shots follows, each showcasing high-volume stacks of consumer goods on pallet racks or metal shelving. Each frame features a prominent yellow price tag overlay. Products include boxes of diapers and stacked chicken meat packages in a refrigerated section. (3) The camera pans over various food items including packages of beef, seafood such as shrimp and small squids, and crates of fruits like peaches. The background remains the consistent warehouse environment with other shoppers appearing as blurred figures in the distance. (4) The montage continues with non-perishable goods like large boxes of snacks, crackers, vitamins, and laundry detergent. The framing is mostly medium close-ups on the product labels to ensure clarity of the brand names and packaging details. (5) The final sequence highlights household items such as blankets, cooking oil, and bottled teas. The visual rhythm remains high-paced with straight cuts between different aisles. The video concludes with shots of bulk-packaged coffee and instant noodles on standard Costco metal warehouse shelving.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator walking in at the start; approximately 9 other shoppers visible in the warehouse background throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male creator wearing a green t-shirt and blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse with high industrial ceilings, heavy-duty metal shelving units, pallet-loaded goods, and various product aisles including refrigerated food sections.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat and high-energy electronic pop BGM starts immediately, featuring a driving synthesized bassline and a steady 4/4 drum machine beat. A male narrator introduces the Costco weekly discount report with a high-arousal, enthusiastic tone. Faint, low-frequency warehouse ambient noise is detectable underneath. (2) As the video cuts to various products, a distinct 'pop' sound effect is heard at every transition to emphasize the new item. The narrator speaks rapidly, listing each product's name and its discount amount in a cheerful, rhythmic manner that aligns with the fast visual cuts. (3) The interplay between the high-tempo music and the constant vocal delivery continues. The 'pop' SFX occurs frequently, approximately every two seconds, marking the presentation of meats, seafood, and snacks. No significant pauses occur in either the vocals or the music. (4) The narrator maintains a consistent, professional yet animated delivery through the end of the list. The music maintains its energetic BPM without fading. The overall mix is clean with the vocal track positioned prominently above the BGM and SFX layers, concluding with a final call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly showcase a large variety of current sales and discounted products at Costco Taiwan for the week of March 18 to March 23, providing viewers with immediate price comparisons to encourage warehouse visits.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of numerous products with original and discounted prices, framed as a weekly savings guide.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video employs an extremely high information density and fast-paced editing style typical of social media consumption, designed to keep viewers engaged while scrolling through a long list of deals.
